Html: I'm looking to have a good learing reference application that walkthroughs unit testing. Is there any chance unit tests could be included with this sample?
Any feedback or thoughts on the idea?
I have no plans to address unit testing for TainSpin Spyworks (since it's a Web Forms applicaton.)
Bummer. Any links or pointers on where to find ASP.NET 4.0 samples that use MSTest Unit Tests?

A VS 2005 link. Great? Looked it over...doesn't cover anything ASP.NET 4 specific but whatever...guess there isn't any real guidance on unit testing for ASP.NET 4.0 with VS 2010. Thanks for the link...but I really am surprised by the dearth of content on unit testing in ASP.Net projects....especially using Microsoft own MSTest platform.
